production_note: agentic_K1 dual-LLM skeptic: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
txs = [
    {'id': 'T1', 'monto': 10},
    {'id': 'T2', 'monto': 25},
    {'id': 'T3', 'monto': 7},
    {'id': 'T4', 'monto': 40},
]
ventana = txs[-3:]
print([r['id'] for r in ventana])
exercises.justification_from_packet: Slice [-3:] = últimas 3 filas sin mutar txs. Ventana T2,T3,T4.

exercises.code:
keys = ('id', 'monto', 'region')
print(keys)
print(type(keys).__name__)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Tupla de columnas como contrato estable (inmutable). type → tuple.

exercises.code:
rows = [{'id': 'T1', 'monto': 10}, {'id': 'T2', 'monto': 5}, {'id': 'T3', 'monto': 20}]
print(any(r['monto'] > 15 for r in rows))
print(all(r['monto'] > 0 for r in rows))
exercises.justification_from_packet: any/all cortocircuitan sobre generadores. any>15 True; all>0 True.

exercises.code:
import copy
clientes = [{'id': 'C001', 'tags': ['vip']}]
alias = clientes
shallow = clientes.copy()
deep = copy.deepcopy(clientes)
print('alias is', alias is clientes)
print('shallow is', shallow is clientes)
print('deep is', deep is clientes)
exercises.justification_from_packet: is distingue alias (True) de copy/deepcopy (False). No confundo igualdad de valor con identidad.

exercises.code:
import copy
clientes = [{'id': 'C001', 'tags': ['vip']}]
shallow = clientes.copy()
shallow[0]['tags'].append('x')
print('original tras shallow mut tags', clientes)
deep = copy.deepcopy([{'id': 'C001', 'tags': ['vip']}])
deep[0]['tags'].append('solo-deep')
print('deep aislado', deep)
exercises.justification_from_packet: copy es superficial: mutar tags anidados se ve en original. deepcopy aísla el anidado.

exercises.code:
import copy
rows = [{'id': 'C1', 'tags': ['a']}]
snap = copy.deepcopy(rows)
rows[0]['tags'].append('b')
print('snap', snap)
print('live', rows)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Snapshot con deepcopy antes de mutar el pipeline: evidencia del estado previo intacta.
Índice dict por id para lookup. Cusco vía idx['C002'].
{**base, **override}: la derecha gana en conflictos. retry=3.
get encadenado sin KeyError. Missing → N/A; presente → Lima.
Operaciones de set: & intersección, - diferencia. sorted para orden estable.

exercises.code:
emails = ['a@ex.com', 'b@ex.com', 'a@ex.com']
print(sorted(set(emails)))
exercises.justification_from_packet: set quita duplicados de cohorte de emails; sorted hace el export determinista.
Conflictos se listan, no se silencian. Primera fila a unique; C001 v=9 a conflicts.
Contar contactos anidados con len. Vacío = 0, no excepción.
Aplanar nested txs a filas con client_id. Tres filas resultantes.

exercises.code:
clients = [
    {'id': 'C001', 'txs': []},
    {'id': 'C002'},
    {'id': 'C003', 'txs': 'oops'},
]
for c in clients:
    txs = c.get('txs')
    ok = isinstance(txs, list)
    print(c['id'], 'ok' if ok else 'review')
exercises.justification_from_packet: Validar shape: isinstance list. Ausente o str → review.
Navegación segura nivel a nivel. phone=999; email missing=N/A.
Missing solo si ausente o None (no truthiness de ''). C001 present; C002/C003 missing.
Tabla mental: todos falsy excepto… no, todos son falsy aquí; missing solo None. 0 y '' no son missing de negocio.

exercises.code:
rows = [{'id': 'T2', 'monto': 30}, {'id': 'T1', 'monto': 10}]
ordered = sorted(rows, key=lambda r: r['monto'])
print([r['id'] for r in ordered])
exercises.justification_from_packet: sorted con key monto: T1 luego T2. No muta rows.

exercises.code:
rows = [
    {'nombre': 'Zed', 'region': 'Lima'},
    {'nombre': 'Ana', 'region': 'Lima'},
    {'nombre': 'Bob', 'region': 'Cusco'},
]
for r in sorted(rows, key=lambda r: (r['region'], r['nombre'])):
    print(r['region'], r['nombre'])
exercises.justification_from_packet: Orden multi-campo con tupla en key. Lexicográfico región+nombre.

exercises.code:
rows = [3, 1, 2]
base = [3, 1, 2]
ret = rows.sort()
copy_sorted = sorted(base)
print('ret', ret)
print('rows', rows)
print('base', base, 'copy', copy_sorted)
exercises.justification_from_packet: sort() → None y muta; sorted() copia. base intacta.

exercises.code:
print('cola de llegada de filas → list')
print('lookup frecuente por id → dict')
print('emails únicos de un lote → set')
exercises.justification_from_packet: Elegir estructura al diseño: list/dict/set según el job de datos.

exercises.code:
import json
payload = {'z': 1, 'a': 2, 'ids': ['C002', 'C001']}
payload['ids'] = sorted(payload['ids'])
print(json.dumps(payload, sort_keys=True, ensure_ascii=False))
exercises.justification_from_packet: sort_keys + ids sorted → JSON reproducible entre corridas.

exercises.code:
ids = ['C001', 'C002', 'C003', 'C004', 'C005']
s = set(ids)
print('list membership: O(n) por chequeo')
print('set membership: O(1) promedio')
print('C003 in set →', 'C003' in s)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Tradeoff membership list vs set con demo pequeña. True para C003.

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: xs[-2:] con [1,2,3,4] son los dos últimos: [3,4]. Slice no incluye error.
b=a es alias de la misma lista: append en b también cambia a.
dedup_report lista conflicts cuando mismo id y payload distinto; no silenciar.
rows.sort retorna None y ordena in-place; no devuelve la lista.
sort_keys=True hace dumps deterministas/reproducibles, no encripta ni valida schema.
